name: context-resume
description: 恢复之前保存的会话上下文。列出所有待处理的 session，读取选定 session 的任务信息，更新进度，任务全部完成后删除文件。
capabilities: Lists all saved sessions from docs/context-sessions directory
Displays session contents with pending task details
Provides workflow for resuming and continuing work
Updates session progress after completing each task
Removes session files when all tasks are finished
Includes command shortcuts for quick actions
author: Claudate
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation (SKILL.md) describing a session resume workflow. No executable code exists. The static analyzer generated false positives by misidentifying plain text as cryptographic algorithms and markdown syntax as shell commands. All 30 findings are dismissed as false positives.
valueStatement: Lose track of your work when switching Claude Code windows? This skill helps you resume saved sessions and continue unfinished tasks seamlessly. List pending sessions, load task context, and track progress until completion.
limitations: Requires context-save skill to create initial sessions
Only works with markdown session files in specified directory
Manual workflow execution - no automation of file operations
Documentation is in Chinese with Chinese output

useCases.title: Continue interrupted coding sessions
useCases.description: Pick up where you left off when switching between Claude Code windows or after interruptions.

useCases.title: Track multi-task workflows
useCases.description: Manage multiple concurrent tasks and switch between them without losing context or progress.

useCases.title: Share session state
useCases.description: Collaborate on complex tasks by saving and resuming sessions across different team members.

promptTemplates.title: List sessions
promptTemplates.prompt: Use context-resume to list all my saved sessions and show which tasks are pending

promptTemplates.title: Resume specific session
promptTemplates.prompt: Load session 20251128-1430-实现用户登录功能.md and show me what needs to be done

promptTemplates.title: Check remaining tasks
promptTemplates.prompt: After loading a session, show me the remaining tasks and their priorities

promptTemplates.title: Complete and cleanup
promptTemplates.prompt: All tasks are done, update the session and delete the file

bestPractices: Update session files immediately after completing each task
Use descriptive session names with dates for easy identification
Delete sessions only after confirming all tasks are complete
antiPatterns: Do not leave sessions open indefinitely without progress updates
Avoid creating too many parallel sessions to prevent confusion
Do not modify session files manually outside the workflow

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It helps you resume saved Claude Code sessions by listing pending work, loading task context, and tracking progress.

faq.question: How do I create sessions?
faq.answer: Use the context-save skill first to save your current session before switching contexts.

faq.question: Where are sessions stored?
faq.answer: Sessions are stored as markdown files in the docs/context-sessions/ directory of your project.

faq.question: Can I share sessions with teammates?
faq.answer: Yes, sessions are markdown files that can be shared and resumed by any team member.

faq.question: When are session files deleted?
faq.answer: Session files are automatically deleted only when all listed tasks have been marked complete.

faq.question: Is this compatible with all Claude Code versions?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill works with any Claude Code installation as it provides documentation-based workflow guidance.
